title: Engineering professionals n.e.c.
description: Represent and promote artists, performers, and athletes in dealings with current or prospective employers. May handle contract negotiation and other business matters for clients. Prepare cost estimates for product manufacturing, construction projects, or services to aid management in bidding on or determining price of product or service. May specialize according to particular service performed or type of product manufactured. Analyze and coordinate the schedule, timeline, procurement, staffing, and budget of a product or service on a per project basis. Lead and guide the work of technical staff. May serve as a point of contact for the client or customer. (Based on 61 related US occupations.)

work_activities.element_name: Communicating with Supervisors, Peers, or Subordinates
Interpreting the Meaning of Information for Others
Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards
Communicating with People Outside the Organization

Resolving Conflicts and Negotiating with Others
Drafting, Laying Out, and Specifying Technical Devices, Parts, and Equipment
Performing for or Working Directly with the Public
Operating Vehicles, Mechanized Devices, or Equipment

Deal With External Customers or the Public in General

tasks.task: Serve as liaison with federal, state, or local agencies or officials on issues pertaining to solid or hazardous waste program requirements.

Plan and supervise forestry projects, including determining the type, number, and placement of trees to be planted, managing tree nurseries, thinning forests, and monitoring the growth of new seedlings.

Develop, implement, or manage plans and programs related to conservation or management of natural resources; provide environmental engineering assistance in network analysis, regulatory analysis, or planning or reviewing database development.
Provide administrative support for projects, including collecting data, providing documentation, training staff, or performing other general administrative duties.
Conduct research to develop new and improved chemical manufacturing processes and analyze data to recommend placement of wells and supplementary processes to enhance production.
Analyze data to recommend placement of wells and supplementary processes to enhance production.

Prepare, maintain, or review validation and compliance documentation, such as engineering change notices, schematics, and protocols, and conduct inspections of forests or forest nurseries to evaluate operational effectiveness or ensure compliance with environmental regulations.
Supervise activities of forestry workers and direct installation or operation of environmental monitoring devices or supervise related data collection programs.

Design, implement, and monitor the development of mines, facilities, systems, or equipment, including specifying processes, labor usage, and equipment that will result in safe, economical, and environmentally sound extraction of minerals and ores.

Collaborate with environmental scientists, planners, hazardous waste technicians, engineers, or other specialists to address environmental problems and advise industries or government agencies about environmental policies and standards.

Conduct public educational programs on forest care and conservation while providing technical support for environmental remediation or litigation projects, including remediation system design and determination of regulatory applicability.
Monitor progress of environmental improvement programs and assess, sort, characterize, or pack known or unknown materials as part of environmental evaluation.
Negotiate terms and conditions of agreements and contracts for forestry activities and plan and direct forest surveys and related studies.
Prepare schedules, reports, and estimates of the costs involved in developing and operating forestry programs and respond to environmental inquiries initiated by stakeholders.

Develop proposed project objectives and report on progress in attaining them, while monitoring contract compliance and evaluating results of forestry activities to ensure adherence to government regulations.
Design, develop, and implement computer applications for use in mining operations, such as mine design, modeling, or mapping.
Inspect industrial or municipal facilities or programs to evaluate operational effectiveness
Analyze effect of environmental conditions on asset operations and recommend workplace changes based on safety assessments.
Prepare, review, or update environmental investigation or recommendation reports while providing environmental engineering assistance in network analysis and regulatory compliance.
Conduct field demonstrations of new products, techniques, or services in forestry, while studying different tree species' classification and life history.

Study product characteristics or customer requirements to determine validation objectives and standards. Maintain validation test equipment. Coordinate the implementation or scheduling of validation testing with affected departments and personnel. Communicate with regulatory agencies regarding compliance documentation or validation results. Assist in training equipment operators or other staff on validation protocols and standard operating procedures. Resolve testing problems by modifying testing methods or revising test objectives and standards. Prepare detailed reports or design statements based on results of validation and qualification tests or reviews of procedures and protocols. Direct validation activities, such as protocol creation or testing. Create, populate, or maintain databases for tracking validation activities, test results, or validated systems. Conduct audits of validation or performance qualification processes to ensure compliance with internal or regulatory requirements. Analyze validation test data to determine whether systems or processes have met validation criteria or to identify root causes of production problems. Prepare validation or performance qualification protocols for new or modified manufacturing processes, systems, or equipment for production of pharmaceuticals, electronics, or other products. Develop validation master plans, process flow diagrams, test cases, or standard operating procedures.

Apply continuous improvement methods, such as lean manufacturing, to enhance manufacturing quality, reliability, or cost-effectiveness. Identify opportunities or implement changes to improve manufacturing processes or products or to reduce costs, using knowledge of fabrication processes, tooling and production equipment, assembly methods, quality control standards, or product design, materials and parts. Incorporate new manufacturing methods or processes to improve existing operations. Design layout of equipment or workspaces to achieve maximum efficiency. Review product designs for manufacturability or completeness. Analyze statistical data and product specifications to determine standards and establish quality and reliability objectives of finished product. Develop manufacturing methods, labor utilization standards, and cost analysis systems to promote efficient staff and facility utilization. Recommend methods for improving utilization of personnel, material, and utilities. Analyze, fabricate, or test fiber-optic links. Conduct research on the structures and properties of materials, such as metals, alloys, polymers, and ceramics, to obtain information that could be used to develop new products or enhance existing ones. Design, integrate, or test photonics systems or components. Develop or test photonic prototypes or models. Conduct testing to determine functionality or optimization or to establish limits of photonics systems or components. Recommend materials for reliable performance in various environments. Test metals to determine conformance to specifications of mechanical strength, strength-weight ratio, ductility, magnetic and electrical properties, and resistance to abrasion, corrosion, heat, and cold. Conduct validation or qualification tests of new or existing processes, equipment, or software in accordance with internal protocols or external standards.

Confer with clients, vendors, staff, and management personnel regarding purchases, product and production specifications, manufacturing capabilities, or project status. Write, review, or comment on documents, such as proposals, test plans, or procedures. Communicate with management and user personnel to develop production and design standards. Write reports summarizing information or trends related to manufacturing performance. Prepare documentation for new manufacturing processes or engineering procedures. Prepare reports, manuscripts, proposals, and technical manuals for use by other scientists and requestors, such as sponsors and customers. Validate or characterize sustainable or environmentally friendly products, using electronic testing platforms. Communicate manufacturing capabilities, production schedules, or other information to facilitate production processes. Manage the development, design, or construction of energy conservation projects to ensure acceptability of budgets and time lines, conformance to federal and state laws, or adherence to approved specifications. Analyze, interpret, or create graphical representations of energy data, using engineering software. Promote awareness or use of alternative or renewable energy sources. Monitor and analyze energy consumption.

Train users in task techniques or ergonomic principles. Train production personnel in new or existing methods. Supervise technicians, technologists, analysts, administrative staff, or other engineers. Conduct training or in-services to educate clinicians and other personnel on proper use of equipment. Assist in the transition of photonic prototypes to production. Develop protocols to improve existing genetic techniques or to incorporate new diagnostic procedures. Conduct applied research aimed at improvements in areas such as disease testing, crop quality, pharmaceuticals, and the harnessing of microbes to recycle waste.

Conduct audits of validation or performance qualification processes to ensure compliance with internal or regulatory requirements. Conduct research on robotic technology to create new robotic systems or system capabilities. Conduct research into the feasibility, design, operation, or performance of robotic mechanisms, components, or systems, such as planetary rovers, multiple mobile robots, reconfigurable robots, or man-machine interactions. Create automated robotic systems to increase production volume or precision in high-throughput operations, such as automated ribonucleic acid (RNA) analysis or sorting, moving, or stacking production materials. Design automated robotic systems to increase production volume or precision in high-throughput operations, such as automated ribonucleic acid (RNA) analysis or sorting, moving, or stacking production materials. Design software to control robotic systems for applications, such as military defense or manufacturing. Write proposals to secure external funding or to partner with other companies.

Develop sustainable manufacturing technologies to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, minimize raw material use, replace toxic materials with non-toxic materials, replace non-renewable materials with renewable materials, or reduce waste. Evaluate current or proposed manufacturing processes or practices for environmental sustainability, considering factors such as greenhouse gas emissions, air pollution, water pollution, energy use, or waste creation. Analyze the financial impacts of sustainable manufacturing processes or sustainable product manufacturing. Inspect or monitor energy systems, including heating, ventilating, and air conditioning (HVAC) or daylighting systems to determine energy use or potential energy savings. Review building plans to verify compliance with fire code.

Research methods of processing, forming, and firing materials to develop such products as ceramic dental fillings, unbreakable dinner plates, and telescope lenses. Visit suppliers of materials or users of products to gather specific information. Conduct research on cell organization and function, including mechanisms of gene expression, cellular bioinformatics, cell signaling, or cell differentiation.

Test individual parts and products to ensure that manufacturer and governmental quality and safety standards are met. Prepare results of experimental findings for presentation at professional conferences or in scientific journals. Extract deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) or perform diagnostic tests involving processes such as gel electrophoresis, Southern blot analysis, and polymerase chain reaction analysis. Maintain laboratory notebooks that record research methods, procedures, and results.

Conduct research on new photonics technologies. Design electro-optical sensing or imaging systems. Determine applications of photonics appropriate to meet product objectives or features. Develop optical or imaging systems, such as optical imaging products, optical components, image processes, signal process technologies, or optical systems. Analyze system performance or operational requirements. Create or maintain photonic design histories.

Collaborate with biologists and other professionals to conduct appropriate genetic and biochemical analyses. Confer with information technology specialists to develop computer applications for genetic data analysis. Communicate with regulatory agencies regarding compliance documentation or validation results. Identify opportunities or implement changes to improve manufacturing processes or products or to reduce costs, using knowledge of fabrication processes, tooling and production equipment, assembly methods, quality control standards, or product design, materials and parts. Analyze statistical data and product specifications to determine standards and establish quality and reliability objectives of finished product. Conduct research into the feasibility, design, operation, or performance of robotic mechanisms, components, or systems, such as planetary rovers, multiple mobile robots, reconfigurable robots, or man-machine interactions. Train personnel or clients on topics such as energy management. Write grants and papers or attend fundraising events to seek research funds.

Design tests of finished products or process capabilities to establish standards or validate process requirements. Review production schedules, engineering specifications, orders, and related information to obtain knowledge of manufacturing methods, procedures, and activities. Analyze, interpret, or evaluate the effectiveness of specific techniques, methodologies, and materials employed in the manufacturing of products. Determine root causes of failures or recommend changes in designs, tolerances, or processing methods, using statistical procedures. Validate or characterize sustainable or environmentally friendly products, using electronic testing platforms.
Conduct applied research aimed at improvements in areas such as disease testing, crop quality, pharmaceuticals, and the harnessing of microbes to recycle waste.
Identify new applications for existing nanotechnologies and develop processes or equipment needed for nanoscale production.

Provide technical guidance or support to customers on nanosystem start-up, maintenance, or use, and provide scientific or technical expertise to scientists and engineers in the context of micro and nanoscale systems.

Generate high-resolution images or measure force-distance curves using atomic force microscopy techniques, and conduct experimental studies to investigate potential microelectromechanical systems (MEMS) technology.

Prepare reports, deliver presentations, or participate in program review activities to communicate engineering results or recommendations, including documenting robotic application development and technical project files.
Debug robotic programs, install, calibrate, operate, or maintain robots, and provide technical support for robotic systems.
Supervise technologists, technicians, or other engineers, and oversee the work of contractors or vendors.
Investigate mechanical failures or unexpected maintenance problems and conduct analyses addressing failure, reliability, or yield improvement.
Analyze operation of wind farms or components to determine reliability and performance, and create wind farm layouts and schematics.
Create plans for solar energy system development, monitoring, and evaluation activities, including solar design specifications and functional requirements.
Create or maintain engineering documents, such as schematics and technical specifications for projects, and propose product designs involving microelectromechanical systems (MEMS) technology.
Design or engineer nanomaterials, nanodevices, and nano-enabled products using CAD software, and create designs or prototypes for nanosystem applications.
Develop methodologies for transferring biological processes from laboratories to commercial-scale manufacturing production and evaluate new technologies to enhance current research.
Prepare project plans for equipment or facility improvements, including timelines and budgetary estimates, and communicate financial and resource management for research projects.
Stay up to date on new regulations and current events in relevant scientific literature, while preparing technical and research reports for publication.
Read current scientific or trade literature to stay abreast of scientific, industrial, or technological advances.
Review reports and proposals for accuracy, adequacy, or adherence to policies, regulations, or scientific standards.
Recommend process formulas, instrumentation, or equipment specifications based on results of bench or pilot experimentation.
Review existing manufacturing processes to identify opportunities for yield improvement or reduced process variation.
Investigate industrial accidents, injuries, or occupational diseases to determine causes and preventive measures.
Conduct research to evaluate safety levels for products and to develop methodologies, instrumentation, and procedures for medical application, analyzing data and presenting findings.
Use a variety of specialized equipment for analyses and research within industrial or biological contexts.
Prepare technical reports and recommendations based upon research outcomes.
Supervise biological technologists, technicians, and other scientists, ensuring effective project execution.
Study the relationship between organisms and disease, including control of epidemics and implications for public health.
Provide laboratory services for health departments and conduct environmental studies related to nuclear power generation and waste disposal.
Collaborate with manufacturing or quality assurance staff to prepare product specifications, safety sheets, and standard operating procedures.
Write grant proposals to obtain funding for research and innovation projects.
Plan, administer, and evaluate health safety standards and programs to improve public health based on research and regulatory compliance.
Evaluate product designs for safety and recommend procedures for hazard detection and elimination.
Conduct training in safety laws and regulations, ensuring compliance with health and safety standards.
Maintain knowledge of current policies, regulations, and industrial processes while developing industry standards of product safety.
Analyze and interpret statistical data related to occupational illnesses and accidents, maintaining liaisons with health and safety organizations.
Conduct literature reviews to stay current on industry developments and best practices.
Design and develop photonics products to enhance energy efficiency and environmental sustainability.
Evaluate robotic systems or prototypes and conduct related research in automation and environmental remediation.
Identify materials and design mechanical models for mechatronic systems.
Research environmental impacts of proposed industrial and agricultural designs and recommend improvements.
Design or oversee construction of nuclear reactors or related systems ensuring safety and efficiency.
Investigate the impact of management practices, environmental conditions, and nutrition on animal health and production efficiency.
Design renewable resource management plans considering ecological sustainability and stakeholder input.
Develop new methods to study the mechanisms of biological processes, isolate and analyze nutrients such as vitamins and hormones, and design experiments with biological and chemical materials.

Monitor and report incidents of infectious diseases, educate healthcare workers and the public about disease transmission and prevention, and prepare samples to identify toxicity or microorganisms in various environments.
Conduct research on the effects of substances on biological systems, study genetic transformations, and develop or test new drugs or methods for disease detection.
Communicate research findings through scientific articles and presentations, and analyze data to forecast outcomes or improve operational processes.
Manage laboratory teams, oversee production and testing processes, and develop new products or processes that enhance quality assurance and efficiency.
Design energy management systems, conduct audits to evaluate energy use, and implement projects that promote energy conservation and efficiency.
Negotiate contracts and manage business affairs for clients, develop promotional strategies, and maintain relationships with stakeholders to ensure client success.
Evaluate and recommend engineering solutions for construction projects, providing technical guidelines and assessing compliance with safety and operational standards.
Advise on the planning and acquisition of engineering equipment and technology, ensuring operations meet regulatory standards.
Consult clients on financial matters, prepare proposals, and develop analytical capabilities using advanced statistical and quantitative methodologies.
Prepare technical reports and documentation for research and engineering projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure compliance with specifications and regulatory requirements.
Direct laboratory operations to develop materials and fabrication procedures, and evaluate new product plans to make recommendations for material selection based on design objectives.
Study the composition and characteristics of materials, including metals and alloys, to enhance their properties for specific applications in products and devices.
Research and develop new systems and processes to improve operations, incorporating innovative technologies for operational efficiency.
Provide application support for researchers and traders on complex analyses to meet industry requirements and specifications.
Gather all relevant material for bid processes, coordinate bidding and contract approval, and establish and maintain the tendering process.

Investigate equipment failures or difficulties and recommend remedial actions; analyze financial data to detect irregularities and assess cost effectiveness of products, projects or services; prepare cost and expenditure statements and documentation at regular intervals for the project; and monitor material performance and evaluate deterioration.

Prepare written reports, technical reports, and documentation of investigative activities related to projects or fraud investigations, including evidence for presentation in court or communication with clients and contractors.

Conduct special studies to develop standard hour and related cost data, reduce costs, and evaluate business operations for potential fraud risks, including testing of marine machinery and systems, design proposals, or project methodologies.

Design and oversee testing, installation, and repair of marine apparatus and equipment, as well as develop, coordinate, or monitor all aspects of production including selection of manufacturing methods and product designs.

Communicate and consult with clients, contractors, and multidisciplinary teams to discuss project needs and recommend design modifications to ensure specifications and regulatory compliance are met, including design, cost estimation, and feasibility analyses.
Evaluate products, systems, or components through research, analysis, and tests, and conduct experiments investigating the performance of equipment or systems in compliance with standards.

Collaborate with product development teams and other engineers, participate in industry trade shows and seminars, and remain informed about trends and methodologies in design and engineering to leverage opportunities for improvement.
Identify and engage potential clients for services while monitoring client feedback to improve product offerings and customer service.
Design and conduct field studies or surveillance to gather data relevant to projects, environmental impacts, or performance testing of equipment and materials.
Read and interpret blueprints, technical drawings, schematics, or computer-generated reports.
Maintain records of performance reports for future reference.
Plan or coordinate investigation and resolution of customers' technical problem reports.
Evaluate and approve vendor selections by studying past performance or advertisements.
Analyze project requests, proposals, or engineering data to determine feasibility, productibility, cost, or production time.
Write technical reports or documentation for engineering staff, management, or customers.
Define specifications for fuel cell materials and systems, including their components and performance characteristics.
Manage fuel cell and related systems, including architecture, integration, and performance optimization.
Analyze fuel cell test data and performance metrics using statistical software.
Design vehicles and components with a focus on materials to improve fuel efficiency and recyclability.
Conduct experiments to validate materials and optimize fuel cell systems' designs and functionalities.
Develop methods for testing fuel cell components and systems, including creating test stations and methodologies.
Research and implement alternative fuels and green technology approaches within the automotive engineering sector.
Establish production or quality control standards for engineering processes.
Provide technical consultation, support, and direction related to engineering projects and product development.
Write and maintain engineering documentation, including reports summarizing testing activities and operational results.
Coordinate engineering activities with other departments to ensure project alignment and integral processes such as procurement and manufacturing.
Develop and implement protocols to assess and manage risks within engineering projects and product developments.
Read current literature and attend conferences to stay updated on technology and best practices in engineering.
Conduct automotive design reviews and provide technical solutions to enhancement projects.
Perform failure, variation, or root cause analyses to improve engineering applications.
Participate in sustainability programs, analyzing issues and developing solutions related to environmental impact.
Identify or create new sustainability indicators and manage programs for environmental compliance.
Prepare reports to summarize testing activities, operational performance, and sustainability efforts.
Develop disaster recovery, crisis management, or business continuity plans related to engineering operations.
Create training materials and conduct presentations to enhance awareness and knowledge in technical fields relevant to engineering.
Design or implement products and services that facilitate the use of new technology or mitigate risks.

Investigate products or markets to determine areas for opportunity or viability for merchandising specific products, using online or offline sources. Develop or revise business plans for online business, emphasizing factors such as product line, pricing, inventory, or marketing strategy. Assess the nature and level of physical security threats to determine the scope of the problem. Perform risk analyses to develop appropriate countermeasures. Prepare documentation for case reports or court proceedings. Communicate with key stakeholders to determine project requirements and objectives. Report project status, such as budget, resources, technical issues, or customer satisfaction, to managers. Plan, schedule, or coordinate project activities to meet deadlines.

Develop or update project plans including information such as objectives, technologies, schedules, funding, and staffing. Identify project needs such as resources, staff, or finances by reviewing project objectives and schedules. Confer with project personnel to identify and resolve problems. Monitor project milestones and deliverables. Assign duties or responsibilities to project personnel. Monitor costs incurred by project staff to identify budget issues. Prepare and submit budget estimates, progress reports, or cost tracking reports.

Direct and supervise employees engaged in sales, inventory-taking, reconciling cash receipts, or performing specific services. Hire, train, and evaluate personnel. Provide staff with assistance in performing difficult or complicated duties. Plan and prepare work schedules, and assign employees to specific duties. Keep records pertaining to purchases, sales, and requisitions. Monitor sales staff performance to ensure that goals are met. Confer with company officials to develop methods and procedures to increase sales, expand markets, and promote business.

Develop sustainability project goals, objectives, initiatives, or strategies in collaboration with other sustainability professionals. Monitor or track sustainability indicators, such as energy usage, natural resource usage, waste generation, and recycling. Assess or propose sustainability initiatives, considering factors such as cost effectiveness, technical feasibility, and acceptance. Collect information about waste stream management or green building practices to inform decision makers. Create marketing or outreach media, such as brochures or Web sites, to communicate sustainability issues, procedures, or objectives. Develop reports or presentations to communicate the effectiveness of sustainability initiatives.

Request and review project updates to ensure deadlines are met. Prepare project status presentations for delivery to customers or project personnel. Schedule or facilitate project meetings. Recruit or hire project personnel. Propose, review, or approve modifications to project plans. Identify, review, or select vendors or consultants to meet project needs. Initiate online auctions through auction hosting sites or auction management software. Investigate sources, such as auctions, estate sales, liquidators, wholesalers, or trade shows for new items, used items, or collectibles.

Keep records pertaining to purchases, sales, and requisitions. Cancel orders based on customer requests or inventory or delivery problems. Fill customer orders by packaging sold items and documentation for direct shipping or by transferring orders to manufacturers or third-party distributors. Calculate revenue, sales, and expenses, using financial accounting or spreadsheet software. Receive and process payments from customers, using electronic transaction services.

Remove irrelevant tasks: Collaborate with search engine shopping specialists to place marketing content in desired online locations; Transfer digital media, such as music, video, or software, to customers via the Internet; Select and purchase technical web services, such as web hosting services, online merchant accounts, shopping cart software, payment gateway software, or spyware; Promote products in online communities through weblog or discussion-forum postings, e-mail marketing programs, or online advertising; Design customer interface of online storefront, using web programming or e-commerce software; Devise, select, or purchase domain name and web address; Implement security practices to preserve assets, minimize liabilities, or ensure customer privacy, using parallel servers, hardware redundancy, fail-safe technology, information encryption, or firewalls; Measure and analyze Web site usage data to maximize search engine returns or refine customer interfaces; Purchase new or used items from online or physical sources for resale via retail or auction Web site; Calculate purchase subtotals, taxes, and shipping costs for submission to customers; Coordinate sales promotion activities, such as preparing merchandise displays and advertising copy; Examine merchandise to ensure correct pricing and display, and that it functions as advertised; Analyze details of sales territories to assess their growth potential and to set quotas; Visit retailers and sales representatives to promote products and gather information; Examine products purchased for resale or received for storage to determine product condition; Inventory stock and reorder when inventories drop to specified levels; Prepare rental or lease agreements, specifying charges and payment procedures for use of machinery, tools, or other items; Correspond with online customers via electronic mail, telephone, or other electronic messaging to address questions or complaints about products, policies, or shipping methods; Maintain and update organization information technology applications and network systems blueprints; Recommend or implement methods to monitor, evaluate, or enable resolution of safety, operations, or compliance interruptions; Compose descriptions of merchandise for posting to online storefront, auction sites, or other shopping Web sites; Design security policies, programs, or practices to ensure adequate security relating to alarm response, access card use, and other security needs; Design, implement, or establish requirements for security systems, video surveillance, motion detection, or closed-circuit television systems to ensure proper installation and operation; Develop conceptual designs of security systems; Develop or review specifications for design or construction of security systems; Engineer, install, maintain, or repair security systems, programmable logic controls, or other security-related electronic systems; Inspect fire, intruder detection, or other security systems; Inspect physical security design features, installations, or programs to ensure compliance with applicable standards or regulations; Interview witnesses or suspects to identify persons responsible for security breaches or to establish losses, pursue prosecutions, or obtain restitution; Monitor tapes or digital recordings to identify the source of losses; Monitor the work of contractors in the design, construction, and startup phases of security systems; Outline system security criteria for pre-bid meetings with clients and companies to ensure comprehensiveness and appropriateness for implementation; Test security measures for final acceptance and implement or provide procedures for ongoing monitoring and evaluation of the measures; Respond to emergency situations on an on-call basis; Recommend improvements in security systems or procedures; Budget and schedule security design work; Conduct security audits to identify potential vulnerabilities related to physical security or staff safety; Direct and supervise employees engaged in sales, inventory-taking, reconciling cash receipts, or performing specific services; Develop or revise business plans for online business, emphasizing factors such as product line, pricing, inventory, or marketing strategy; Maintain and update organization information technology applications and network systems blueprints; Listen to and resolve customer complaints regarding services, products, or personnel; Monitor sales staff performance to ensure that goals are met; Hire, train, and evaluate personnel; Provide staff with assistance in performing difficult or complicated duties; social media; Pmaintain effective communication and work with all team members; resolve conflicts; address operational needs.
